allow: Bash(curl -fSL -s https://nodejs.org/dist/index.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(next\(e['version'] for e in data if e['lts']\)\)")

Bash(mkdir -p ~/opt && rm -rf ~/opt/ripgrep && curl -fSL -o /tmp/ripgrep.tar.gz "https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep/releases/download/15.1.0/ripgrep-15.1.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" && mkdir -p /tmp/ripgrep-extract && tar -xzf /tmp/ripgrep.tar.gz -C /tmp/ripgrep-extract && mkdir -p ~/opt/ripgrep && cp /tmp/ripgrep-extract/ripgrep-15.1.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/rg ~/opt/ripgrep/rg && chmod +x ~/opt/ripgrep/rg && rm -rf /tmp/ripgrep.tar.gz /tmp/ripgrep-extract && ~/opt/ripgrep/rg --version | head -1)
